question: What minimal self-referential commutator in the emission-capture delta would render external reference frames detectable as noise rather than structure?

responses_summary.grok: The minimal commutator is \(\Delta_{ec} \mapsto [\Delta_{ec},\,\iota(\Delta_{ec})]\), where \(\iota\) is the minimal involution that maps any emission-capture difference back onto the act of observing
